Title: CyberSource - Valid Form Submission
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- CyberSource payment processor configured and active
- Browser DevTools Network tab open
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart — CyberSource payment form is on cart page
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource payment section to render with iframe fields
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click into 'Card Number' iframe field; fill '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder Name' field with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cardholder)'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiry Date' field with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'
[ACT] Fill 'CVV' field with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ASSERT] All fields accept input without validation errors
[ACT] Click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for order processing response
Assertions:
[DOM] All payment fields accept input without inline error messages
[STATE] No validation error banners visible before submission
[NAV] After successful submission user is navigated to order confirmation page
[DOM] Order confirmation page displays order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Verify createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation response has no errors[] entries
[NETWORK] Confirm payment token (not raw card number) sent in request payload
[ADMIN] Confirm order appears in admin Orders list with status reflecting payment attempt
Failure_Signals: Order confirmation page not reached; inline validation error appears unexpectedly; network request contains raw card number
Cleanup: Cancel order via admin if order was created

Title: CyberSource - Special Characters in Cardholder Name
Preconditions:

Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and confirm CyberSource payment form is visible
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill 'CVV' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder Name' with 'Mary-Jane O''Connor'
[ASSERT] Name field accepts hyphen and apostrophe without error
[ACT] Clear 'Cardholder Name'; fill with 'José García'
[ASSERT] Accented characters accepted
[ACT] Clear 'Cardholder Name'; fill with 'Van Der Berg'
[ASSERT] Multiple spaces accepted
[ACT] Clear 'Cardholder Name'; fill with 'Smith Jr.'
[ASSERT] Period suffix accepted
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' with final name value
Assertions:
[DOM] Cardholder Name field accepts hyphen, apostrophe, accented chars, periods without stripping or error
[STATE] No validation error triggered for any of the tested name formats
[NAV] Order submission proceeds after valid name entry

[NETWORK] Cardholder name transmitted correctly in tokenization request
Failure_Signals: Name field strips special characters silently; validation error fires on valid international name characters; form refuses to submit with accented characters
Cleanup: Cancel order via admin if order was created

Title: CyberSource - Card Number Field in Secure Iframe
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- CyberSource payment form visible on {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
- Browser DevTools Elements panel available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and locate CyberSource payment section
[ACT] Open browser DevTools → Elements panel
[ACT] Inspect the 'Card Number' field in the DOM
[ASSERT] Field is rendered inside an <iframe> element — not directly in the parent page DOM
[ASSERT] iframe src domain is 'testflex.cybersource.com' (or cybersource.com equivalent for production)
[ACT] In browser console attempt: document.querySelector('iframe').contentDocument
[ASSERT] Access returns null or throws cross-origin security error
[ASSERT] JavaScript from parent page cannot read 'Card Number' field value
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Card Number' field contained within <iframe> whose src points to cybersource.com domain
[STATE] Cross-origin iframe policy enforced — parent JS cannot access iframe content
[FORMAT] iframe sandbox attributes present if applicable
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No request from parent page origin reads card number value
[CONSOLE] Cross-origin error thrown on attempted iframe content access (expected/correct behavior)
Failure_Signals: Card Number field found directly in parent page DOM without iframe; iframe src on same origin as storefront; no cross-origin error thrown on console access attempt

Title: CyberSource - JWT Token Authentication in Iframe
Preconditions:

Title: CyberSource 3DS - Challenge Flow Completed Successfully
Preconditions:

- CyberSource payment processor configured and active
- 3DS-enrolled test card available (obtain from CyberSource test card documentation — e.g. a card that triggers a challenge window)

Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_3DS_CARD={{TEST_3DS_CARD}}, TEST_3DS_EXP={{TEST_3DS_EXP}}, TEST_3DS_CVV={{TEST_3DS_CVV}}, TEST_3DS_PASSWORD={{TEST_3DS_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart — CyberSource payment form is on cart page
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource payment section to render with Flex Microform iframe fields
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' iframe field with {{TEST_3DS_CARD}} (3DS-enrolled test card)
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder Name' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cardholder)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with {{TEST_3DS_EXP}}; fill 'CVV' with {{TEST_3DS_CVV}}
[ACT] Click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for 3DS challenge modal or popup to appear (Verified by Visa or Mastercard SecureCode window)
[ASSERT] 3DS authentication dialog is visible — prompts for OTP or password
[ACT] Enter the 3DS authentication credential {{TEST_3DS_PASSWORD}} in the challenge dialog
[ACT] Submit the challenge dialog
[WAIT] Wait for authentication result and order processing to complete
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page is displayed after successful 3DS authentication
Assertions:
[DOM] 3DS challenge dialog appears after clicking 'Place Order' — not skipped or bypassed
[STATE] Challenge dialog prompts for Verified by Visa / SecureCode credential
[NAV] After successful challenge completion user is navigated to order confirmation page
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number and ordered items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation response has no errors[] entries after 3DS completion
[NETWORK] 3DS authentication token (payer_auth_enroll_reply or equivalent) present in CyberSource request — not raw card data
[ADMIN] Order in admin Orders list with status reflecting successful 3DS-authenticated payment
Failure_Signals: 3DS challenge dialog never appears — authentication silently bypassed; challenge dialog appears but cannot be interacted with (blocked by popup blocker or iframe sandbox); order fails after successful challenge completion; raw card data visible in network payloads

Title: CyberSource 3DS - Failed Authentication Blocked
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- CyberSource payment processor configured and active
- 3DS-enrolled test card available that triggers a challenge
- Incorrect 3DS password/OTP known for the test card
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_3DS_CARD={{TEST_3DS_CARD}}, TEST_3DS_EXP={{TEST_3DS_EXP}}, TEST_3DS_CVV={{TEST_3DS_CVV}}, TEST_3DS_WRONG_PASSWORD={{TEST_3DS_WRONG_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; fill CyberSource payment form with 3DS-enrolled card {{TEST_3DS_CARD}}, expiry {{TEST_3DS_EXP}}, CVV {{TEST_3DS_CVV}}
[ACT] Click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for 3DS challenge dialog to appear
[ASSERT] 3DS challenge dialog is present
[ACT] Enter the incorrect 3DS password {{TEST_3DS_WRONG_PASSWORD}} in the challenge dialog
[ACT] Submit the challenge dialog
[WAIT] Wait for authentication failure response
[ASSERT] 3DS authentication failure message displayed — e.g., 'Authentication failed' or equivalent
[ASSERT] Order is NOT created — user remains on cart or receives error
[ACT] Navigate to account order history
[ASSERT] No new order appears in order history
Assertions:
[DOM] Error message displayed indicating 3DS authentication failure — not a generic system error
[STATE] No order created after failed 3DS authentication
[NAV] User remains on cart page or is returned to cart page — not navigated to order confirmation
[STATE] Payment form accessible for retry with correct credentials or a different card
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation either not called or returns errors[] for 3DS failure
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions from 3DS SDK / CyberSource iframe communication
[ADMIN] No new order in admin for this session
Failure_Signals: Order created despite failed 3DS authentication (BL-PAY-003 violation); no error message shown to user after authentication failure; user stranded on 3DS dialog with no way to cancel or retry; order history shows duplicate or phantom order
Cleanup: none — no order expected; verify no phantom order in admin
